articles.title: Jamaica Mi Hungry closes restaurant, shifts focus back to food truck
articles.description:
After announcing the closure of its Downtown Boston restaurant, Jamaica Mi Hungry unveiled its summer food truck schedule and said it will focus exclusively on catering and its mobile service.

The post Jamaica Mi Hungry closes restaurant, shifts focus back to food truck appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jamaica Mi Hungry closed its Downtown Boston restaurant to focus on its food truck.
The food truck will operate with a new summer schedule, enhancing mobile service.
This shift impacts local dining options, emphasizing catering and mobile food services.

articles.title: Report finds former Canton Sgt. Sean Goode used ‘horrific’ language in texts
articles.description:
The report presents a staggering array of crass and offensive messages, with Goode regularly using demeaning terms for any number of ethnic groups, minorities, and protected classes.

The post Report finds former Canton Sgt. Sean Goode used ‘horrific’ language in texts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former Canton Sgt. Sean Goode used offensive language in texts, sparking public outrage.
The report details numerous demeaning messages targeting ethnic groups and minorities.
Local leaders call for accountability and reforms in police conduct following the findings.

articles.title: Alvin Campbell Jr., serial rapist and AG’s brother, receives life in prison
articles.description:
Campbell was convicted of raping five women and attempting to assault a sixth between 2017 and 2019.

The post Alvin Campbell Jr., serial rapist and AG’s brother, receives life in prison appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alvin Campbell Jr. sentenced to life in prison for raping five women from 2017 to 2019.
Convicted on multiple charges, including attempted assault on a sixth victim.
His conviction aims to enhance safety and justice for Boston residents.
